notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Carson Kelly out at 2nd. Miguel Amaya out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.

notableEvents.label: Matt Chapman grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman hits a grand slam (3) to center field. Luis Arraez scores. Willy Adames scores. Bryce Eldridge scores.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Cox pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Cox singles on a line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Cox pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Cox singles on a line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto grounds out, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Cox pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Cox homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto grounds out, pitcher Carson Kelly to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
